---
title: "Splide Image Carousel Example"
format:
    html:
        output-file: index.html
        height: 800 # default height and width ensure consistent behaviour on different screens
        width: 1250
filters:
    - splide-carousel
---

## Simple Carousel Example

Here is a carousel with three images.

```md
:::{.splide-carousel}
![](example_assets/1_intro_or_ds_python.jpeg)
![](example_assets/2_des.jpeg)
![](example_assets/3_geographic.jpeg)
:::
```

:::{.splide-carousel}
![](example_assets/1_intro_or_ds_python.jpeg)
![](example_assets/2_des.jpeg)
![](example_assets/3_geographic.jpeg)
:::

## Standard carousel example

```md
:::{.splide-carousel preview="false"}
![](example_assets/1_intro_or_ds_python.jpeg)
![](example_assets/2_des.jpeg)
![](example_assets/3_geographic.jpeg)
:::
```

:::{.splide-carousel preview="false"}
![](example_assets/1_intro_or_ds_python.jpeg)
![](example_assets/2_des.jpeg)
![](example_assets/3_geographic.jpeg)
:::

## Captions

```md
:::{.splide-carousel preview="false"}
![Intro to Python](example_assets/1_intro_or_ds_python.jpeg)
![Discrete Event Simulation](example_assets/2_des.jpeg){width="100px"}
![Mapping and Geographic Optimization](example_assets/3_geographic.jpeg)
:::
```

:::{.splide-carousel}
![Intro to Python](example_assets/1_intro_or_ds_python.jpeg)
![Discrete Event Simulation](example_assets/2_des.jpeg)
![Mapping and Geographic Optimization](example_assets/3_geographic.jpeg)
:::


### Preview = false

:::{.splide-carousel preview="false"}
![Intro to Python](example_assets/1_intro_or_ds_python.jpeg)
![Discrete Event Simulation](example_assets/2_des.jpeg)
![Mapping and Geographic Optimization](example_assets/3_geographic.jpeg)
:::



## Intervals

Set the interval parameter to speed up or slow down the transition between slides. Note that this is specified in ms (1 second = 1000ms) and must be passed as a string containing just the number (i.e. no unit).

Default is 9 seconds.

Below is an example of 1 second ("1000").

```md
:::{.splide-carousel preview="false" interval="1000"}
![Intro to Python](example_assets/1_intro_or_ds_python.jpeg)
![Discrete Event Simulation](example_assets/2_des.jpeg)
![Mapping and Geographic Optimization](example_assets/3_geographic.jpeg)
:::
```

:::{.splide-carousel interval="1000"}
![Intro to Python](example_assets/1_intro_or_ds_python.jpeg)
![Discrete Event Simulation](example_assets/2_des.jpeg)
![Mapping and Geographic Optimization](example_assets/3_geographic.jpeg)
:::
